creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to peo from comment #37)
With 6.4.5 qt5+cairo should be the default so you should no longer need to set an environment variable.  Check with "svn status /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice" if you still have any local modifications from trying earlier patches.  You can restore a file using "svn revert /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/....".
